description: A patient with a history of resected colon cancer presents with new abdominal fullness and jaundice. Imaging reveals lesions in the right lobe of the liver. The patient also reports significant shortness of breath.
expected_diagnosis: Metastatic Colon Cancer with Hepatic Involvement
graph_evidence_hint: Metastatic Colon Cancer --Located-In--> Right Lobe of the Liver
Right Lobe of the Liver --Located-In--> Liver
Metastatic Colon Cancer --Causes--> Shortness of Breath
Liver Biopsy --Used-For--> Diagnosis of Metastatic Colon Cancer

description: A 72-year-old with long-standing hypertension develops palpitations and then acute onset right-sided facial droop and weakness. CT head rules out hemorrhage. He is started on antithrombotic therapy and aspirin.
expected_diagnosis: Cardioembolic Acute Ischemic Stroke secondary to Atrial Fibrillation

description: An elderly patient with severe aortic stenosis develops progressive dyspnea and bilateral pleural effusions. Echo shows left ventricular hypertrophy. NT-proBNP is markedly elevated.
expected_diagnosis: Heart Failure with Pulmonary Edema due to Severe Aortic Stenosis
graph_evidence_hint: Severe Aortic Stenosis --Associated-With--> Left Ventricle Hypertrophy

description: A heavy smoker with hyperlipidemia presents with acute neurological deficit. Imaging confirms acute ischemic stroke. He is started on intensive statin therapy and aspirin for secondary prevention.
expected_diagnosis: Acute Ischemic Stroke with Atherosclerotic Risk Factors
graph_evidence_hint: Statin Therapy --Associated-With--> Reduced Risk of Future Strokes

description: A patient with chronic alcohol use presents with jaundice, abdominal pain, and altered mental status. Labs show elevated bilirubin; imaging shows cirrhotic liver and ascites. Lactulose and rifaximin are initiated.
expected_diagnosis: Hepatic Encephalopathy secondary to Alcoholic Cirrhosis

description: A diabetic patient on metformin presents with severe abdominal pain, acidosis, and lactic acidosis on labs. Renal function is impaired.
A patient with a history of alcohol withdrawal develops generalized seizures in the ED, followed by a post-ictal period with decreased interactiveness. EEG monitoring is initiated.
expected_diagnosis: Alcohol Withdrawal Seizures with Post-ictal State

description: A patient presents with right flank pain, fever, and dysuria. Urinalysis shows hematuria and urine culture grows Klebsiella. She is started on ciprofloxacin.

An elderly man with BPH and enlarged prostate develops urinary retention and hydronephrosis of the left kidney, complicated by sepsis from a urinary source. Foley catheter and tamsulosin are initiated.
expected_diagnosis: Obstructive Uropathy with Urosepsis due to BPH
graph_evidence_hint: enlarged prostate --Associated-With--> sepsis from a urinary source

description: A patient on warfarin for atrial fibrillation presents with fatigue and melena. Labs show iron deficiency anemia with abnormal MCV. A GI bleed workup is initiated.
expected_diagnosis: GI Bleed causing Iron Deficiency Anemia in Anticoagulated Patient

description: A patient presents with worsening headache, photophobia, and nausea. MRI shows multiple hemorrhagic cerebral metastases with surrounding vasogenic edema. A small lung nodule is noted on chest imaging.
expected_diagnosis: Brain Metastases from Primary Lung Malignancy
graph_evidence_hint: multiple hemorrhagic cerebral metastases --Associated-With--> vasogenic edema
5-mm mildly avid left upper lobe lung nodule --Associated-With--> metastasis

description: A patient with a resected prostate cancer shows elevated telomerase activity in renal tumors noted on follow-up imaging. Germline testing reveals genetic variants associated with leukocyte telomere length.
expected_diagnosis: Renal Cell Carcinoma with Telomere Biology Alterations
graph_evidence_hint: Relative Telomere Length --Biomarker-Of--> Renal Cell Carcinoma
Leukocyte Telomere Length --Associated-With--> Renal Cell Carcinoma Risk
